subcodes.first_line: Upon thee, O bearer of tribulations and exile in the path of God, the Lord of Names, O thou Who art imprisoned for having turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: علیک یا حامل البلاء و المنفی فی سبیل الله مالک الاسماء و المسجون بما اعرضت عن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
